title: MPPSC State Service Exam SSE Pre Result 2026 for 155 Post
short_information: Madhya Pradesh Public Service Commission MPPSC Released Notification for State Service Exam Recruitment Exam 2026. Those candidates who are interested in this MPPSC Pre Exam can Apply Online from 10/01/2026 to 09/02/2026. Read the MPPSC State Service Exam SSE Various Post notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, age limit, pay scale and all other information. Madhya Pradesh Public Service Commission (MPPSC) MPPSC State Service Exam SSE Recruitment 2026 MPPSC Advt No : 29/2025 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / Other State : 540/- OBC / EWS / SC / ST: Rs. 290/ – Note: Portal Charges Include: Rs. 40/- Correction Charge: Rs. 50/- Phase I : 3000/- + Portal Fee Phase II : 25000/- + Portal Fee Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, Authorized Kiosk MPPSC State Service Exam SSE
eligibility: Read the Notification. MPPSC 2026 Examination : Post Wise

tables.table_name: MPPSC State Service Exam SSE Notification 2025 : Age Limit as on 01/01/2026 Minimum Age : 21 Years Maximum Age : 33-40 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per MPPSC State Service Exam SSE Recruitment Rules.

text_sections.section: How to Fill MPPSC State Service Exam SSE Recruitment Online Form 2026
text_sections.content: MPPSC State Service Exam SSE Recruitment for Various Post Candidate Can Apply Between 10/01/2026 to 09/02/2026 | Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in MPPSC State Service Exam SSE Recruitment 2026. | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. | If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. | Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
